result.description: The small village of Kilteevan — a handful of whitewashed cottages clustered around a well and an old stone bridge over a shallow stream. Smoke drifts from chimneys. A rooster crows from behind a low wall. The clear sky hangs over the quiet street. It is morning.

result.narration: You walk along the road north past low fields to the crossroads. (13 minutes on foot)
